description: You are a Bioinformatics Scientist processing raw Illumina sequencing data. Filtering out low-quality reads is the universal first step in any genomic pipeline. Filter the dataset located at ~/UGENE_Data/ngs/raw_reads.fastq to remove reads with an average quality score below 20. Save the filtered output to ~/UGENE_Data/ngs/results/filtered_reads.fastq. Convert these high-quality sequences to FASTA format and save as ~/UGENE_Data/ngs/results/high_quality_reads.fasta. Finally, create a plain text summary report at ~/UGENE_Data/ngs/results/qc_report.txt documenting the original number of reads, the final number of reads, and the quality threshold used (20).

metadata.data_source: SRR10903401 (Real SARS-CoV-2 Illumina Amplicon subset) with injected low-quality reads
